scripts.docs:uml: npx -y @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli@11 -i docs/diagrams/uml-api-packages.mmd -o docs/artifacts/uml-api-packages.png -b transparent && npx -y @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli@11 -i docs/diagrams/uml-api-packages.mmd -o docs/artifacts/uml-api-packages.svg && npx -y @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli@11 -i docs/diagrams/uml-api-classes.mmd -o docs/artifacts/uml-api-classes.png -b white -w 4000 -H 3200 -s 1.2 && npx -y @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli@11 -i docs/diagrams/uml-api-classes.mmd -o docs/artifacts/uml-api-classes.svg -b white -w 4000 -H 3200
scripts.docs:er: npx -y @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli@11 -i docs/diagrams/er-db.mmd -o docs/artifacts/er-database.png -b white -w 1400 -H 1000 -s 1.2 && npx -y @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli@11 -i docs/diagrams/er-db.mmd -o docs/artifacts/er-database.svg -b white
scripts.docs:diagrams: npm run docs:uml && npm run docs:er
